offer: For restaurant accountants processing 20-50 invoices/month, time-consuming tax preparation causes late submissions. We convert daily sales receipts into tax submission formats instead of manual entry into tax software.
problem: Time-consuming tax preparation from daily sales receipts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant accountants
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant accountants with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try basic receipt categorization and export on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
